name: Hilary Clinton's Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Brush baking sheets lightly with vegetable oil.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, salt, and baking soda on wax paper.
4. In another large bowl, beat together shortening, brown sugar, granulated sugar, and vanilla until creamy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the shortening mixture, stirring until just combined.
7. Stir in the rolled oats and chocolate chips.
8. Drop batter by rounded teaspoonsfuls onto prepared baking sheets.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Cool cookies on sheets for 2 minutes before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
11. Makes approximately 7 dozen cookies.
